note: Prior result was speculative (worker did not read actual files). This result is evidence-based — all findings verified by reading directory listings, parquet metadata, manifest files, pipeline logs, and DB queries.

paper_trade_history.status: STALE — guard_block_rate=1.0 blocks new entries since ~Apr 12

retrosheet_game_logs.status: MISSING 2026 season (Retrosheet publishes with multi-month lag)

elo_table.status: MISSING 2026 games — live model falls back to pregame_win_prob=0.54 default for ALL 2026 games

trained_model.status: NO 2026 DATA IN TRAINING — model blind to current-season distribution

gap_map.name: ELO table missing all 2026 game results
gap_map.impact: Live model pregame prior = 0.54 (flat default) for every 2026 game. ELO is the model's only pregame discriminator (feature: elo_diff_norm). Without it the model cannot distinguish team quality at all before the game starts.
gap_map.evidence: elo_table.parquet max date = 2025-09-28; recommendation_api.py line 82 shows fallback to 0.54 when ELO not found; shadow logs confirm pregame_win_prob=0.54 on all 2026 games sampled
gap_map.data_required: 2026 game scores with home/away teams — present in foundation/mlb_statsapi/season=2026/raw/games/
gap_map.code_required: Re-run Elo pipeline (pregame_prior_builder) against 2026 foundation game data

gap_map.name: features_all.parquet and snapshots_2026.parquet do not exist
gap_map.impact: Cannot retrain or calibrate on any 2026 data. Feature store is entirely blind to the current season. Any model rebuild stops here.
gap_map.evidence: features_all.parquet seasons=[2018..2025], built 2026-04-10; no snapshots_2026.parquet in data/features/
gap_map.data_required: Foundation 2026 data — already present and complete through Apr 16
gap_map.code_required: Run state_snapshot_builder for 2026 date range, then feature_store for season=2026

gap_map.name: 2026 statcast pitch-level data absent
gap_map.impact: Historical pitcher-level metrics (velocity, spin rate, exit velocity) for 2026 season unavailable. Live in-game pitcher features (pitch_count, tto, is_bullpen) are derived from real-time statsapi, not historical statcast — so live inference works around this, but retraining on 2026 data will be missing pitch-quality signal.
gap_map.evidence: Newest statcast file = 2025_10.parquet; pipeline.log at 2026-04-02 shows every statcast download failed: 'No module named pybaseball'
gap_map.workaround: Live model uses real-time statsapi game-state for pitch features; stale statcast is not a live inference blocker, but IS a retraining gap

gap_map.name: Model not trained on any 2026 data
gap_map.impact: lgbm + logistic models trained on 2018-2025 only. Any 2026 distributional shift (new teams, rule changes, park factors) is invisible to the model.
gap_map.dependency: Requires GAP-001 (ELO) and GAP-002 (features/snapshots) to be resolved first
gap_map.note: Only ~24 game-days of 2026 data available as of today; limited signal but adds current-season calibration

gap_map.name: Paper trade data gap Apr 12–17 (5 days, ~30+ games)
gap_map.impact: No paper trade outcomes for evaluation during Apr 12-17 window. Calibration and performance tracking blind for this period. Shadow recommendations are flowing but no position decisions are being made.
gap_map.can_fix_without_new_download: N/A — this is an execution/guard issue, not a data download issue
gap_map.note: Shadow recommendations still flow, so recommendation-level audit IS possible for this window; only position-level outcomes are missing

gap_map.name: 2026 Retrosheet game logs unavailable
gap_map.impact: Retrosheet-format game logs unavailable for 2026 season.
gap_map.evidence: Newest file: game_log_2025.parquet; Retrosheet publishes with multi-month lag
gap_map.recommendation: SKIP — foundation/mlb_statsapi data covers the same game outcomes and is already present. Retrosheet game logs are redundant for 2026 purposes.

gap_map.name: mlb_model/runtime empty
gap_map.impact: No cached runtime inference artifacts. Live inference rebuilds team state from scratch each session.
gap_map.note: Not blocking rebuild or live inference; only affects startup latency

gap_map.name: 2026 statcast advanced metrics (pitch quality, spin, exit velo)
gap_map.impact: 2026 pitch-quality features unavailable for feature engineering. Current model uses simpler pitch_count/TTO metrics derived from real-time statsapi, not historical statcast — so these metrics are already available live.
gap_map.evidence: FEATURE_COLUMNS in feature_store.py uses home_pitch_count_norm, home_tto, home_is_bullpen — sourced from game state, not statcast
gap_map.blocker: BLOCK-001 — pybaseball not installed (same as GAP-003)
gap_map.recommendation: Defer — not required for core model rebuild; current feature set works without it

must_have_summary: GAP-001 ELO 2026 — CRITICAL — live pregame prior broken; fixable now from existing foundation data
GAP-002 Feature/snapshot 2026 — HIGH — no 2026 features exist; fixable now from existing data
GAP-003 Statcast 2026 — HIGH — blocked by missing pybaseball; workaround: live statsapi covers real-time pitch features
GAP-004 Model retrain on 2026 — MEDIUM — depends on GAP-001+002; data is ready once those are resolved
GAP-005 Paper trade gap Apr 12-17 — MEDIUM — guard-side execution issue, not a data download issue
optional_summary: GAP-006 Retrosheet 2026 — LOW — superseded by foundation API data already present
GAP-007 Runtime artifacts — LOW — not blocking anything
GAP-008 Statcast advanced metrics 2026 — LOW — not core model feature; blocked anyway

blockers.impact: Prevents all statcast downloads (GAP-003, GAP-008); pipeline.log confirms every statcast step failed on Apr 2 pipeline run

blockers.description: Retrosheet 2026 data not yet published (structural lag)
blockers.fix: Not actionable this season; use foundation/mlb_statsapi as canonical source — already present and complete

immediate_build_opportunities: ELO rebuild for 2026 — run pregame_prior_builder against foundation/mlb_statsapi/season=2026/raw/games/; no downloads needed
Snapshot build for 2026 — run state_snapshot_builder for 2026-03-25 through 2026-04-16; all source data present
Feature table refresh — run feature_store with season=2026 after snapshot is built
Pipeline rerun including season 2026 — after ELO and features ready; re-run train_lightgbm + calibrate_model
summary: The 2026 MLB season foundation data (games, team/pitcher logs, game-state history) is complete through Apr 16 — two successful backfills ran Apr 12 and Apr 17. The critical gap is that the ELO table and feature store stop at end-of-2025, leaving the live model with a flat 0.54 pregame prior for every 2026 game. GAP-001 (ELO) and GAP-002 (features/snapshots) are the highest-priority must-haves and both can be resolved immediately from data already on disk. GAP-003 (statcast 2026) requires a one-line fix (pip install pybaseball) plus a download run. Retrosheet 2026 is not available and not needed — foundation data is a better source. The paper trade gap (Apr 12-17) is a guard-side execution issue, not a missing data download.
